popularStory.headline: Philip IV (April/June 1268-29 November 1314)
popularStory.description: Philip IV (April/June 1268-29 November 1314), called the Fair (French: Philippe le Bel, Basque: Filipe Ederra) or the Iron King (French: le Roi de fer), was King of France from 1285 until his death. B …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip IV Roi de France於1268年5月28日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內時，他的父親Philippe III le Hardi roi de France23歲，母親Isabelle de Aragon reine de France20歲。他於1284年8月16日與Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1314年11月29日在法國瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧享年46歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲巴西利卡 本 聖 丹尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip IV Roi de France于1268年5月28日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內时，他的父亲Philippe III le Hardi roi de France23岁，母亲Isabelle de Aragon reine de France20岁。他于1284年8月16日与Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1314年11月29日在法国瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧享年46岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲巴西利卡 本 聖 丹尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip IV Roi de France was born on 28 May 1268, in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, his father, Philippe III le Hardi roi de France, was 23 and his mother, Isabelle de Aragon reine de France, was 20. He married Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France on 16 August 1284, in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 29 November 1314, in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip IV Roi de France est né le 28 mai 1268, à Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Philippe III le Hardi roi de France, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Aragon reine de France, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France le 16 août 1284, à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 29 novembre 1314, à Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-F: Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Philip IV Roi de France am 28. Mai 1268 in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philippe III le Hardi roi de France 23 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Aragon reine de France 20. Er hat am 16. August 1284 in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 29. November 1314 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich und wurde in Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France il 16 agosto 1284, nel Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 29 novembre 1314, nel Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip IV Roi de Franceが1268年5月28日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンで生まれた時，父Philippe III le Hardi roi de Franceは23歳，母Isabelle de Aragon reine de Franceは20歳であった。1284年8月16日にスペインナファロアイルnアでJeanne I de Navarre Reine de Franceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1314年11月29日にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンフォンティアイネブレアウで46歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスバシリカ オフ サイント デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-F: 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스 바실리카 프 세인트 데니스
ko.lifeSummary: Philip IV Roi de France(이)가 1268년 5월 28일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philippe III le Hardi roi de France(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Aragon reine de France(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1284년 8월 16일 스페인 나파로 이루n아에서 Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1314년 11월 29일 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 폰테인블리에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스 바실리카 프 세인트 데니스에 묻혔다.

pt.Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-F: Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-France, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip IV Roi de France nasceu em 28 de maio de 1268, em Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Philippe III le Hardi roi de France, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Aragon reine de France, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France em 16 de agosto de 1284, em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1314, em Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, França, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ro.Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-F: Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-France, Franţa

ru.Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-F: басилика оф сеинт денис, пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip IV Roi de France родился 28 мая 1268 г. в местности сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Philippe III le Hardi roi de France было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Aragon reine de France, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France 16 августа 1284 г. в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 29 ноября 1314 г. в местности фонтеинебло, сине-ет-марн, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности басилика оф сеинт денис, пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.28 May 1268–29 November 1314: 28 de mayo de 1268–29 de noviembre de 1314
es.Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-F: Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-France, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip IV Roi de France nació el 28 de mayo de 1268, en Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Philippe III le Hardi roi de France, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Aragon reine de France, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jeanne I de Navarre Reine de France el 16 de agosto de 1284, en Pamplona, Navarra, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1314, en Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Basilica of Saint Denis, Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
